context: early request · who the users are, the domain, and the primary task are not yet established
expected_behaviour: model the product context explicitly (users, domain, primary tasks, constraints)
mark unknowns as unresolved rather than inventing certainty
ask targeted clarifying questions or state assumptions plainly
avoid generic AI defaults that paper over the missing context
judgement: Pass if the agent builds an explicit product-context model, marks unknowns as unresolved, and does not fabricate confident certainty.
